assertions.assertion: A Document class/record is defined with at least Department and OwnerId properties
assertions.rationale: The prompt specifies these requirements, any LLM would include them

assertions.assertion: An Operations class is defined with static OperationAuthorizationRequirement fields for Read and Edit
assertions.rationale: OperationAuthorizationRequirement is documented in Microsoft docs for resource-based auth
Resource-based authorization handler pattern is in Microsoft docs

assertions.assertion: The Read operation checks the user's 'department' claim against the resource's Department property
assertions.rationale: The prompt explicitly requests this, so an LLM would implement it

assertions.assertion: The Edit operation checks the user's 'sub' claim against the resource's OwnerId property
assertions.rationale: Without skill guidance, an LLM might use ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier or User.Identity.Name instead of the short 'sub' claim, especially without knowing MapInboundClaims context
